problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species may resolve How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
